task_completion.description: Create the specified project and experiment in SciNote
task_completion.visual_evidence: The SciNote interface should display a project named 'Ibuprofen Forced Degradation - ICH Q1A' containing an experiment named 'Stress Testing Panel'.

task_completion.description: Create 5 tasks and connect them in a fan-out/fan-in pattern
task_completion.visual_evidence: The workflow canvas should show 'Stock Solution Preparation' with outgoing arrows to 'Acid Hydrolysis (0.1M HCl)', 'Base Hydrolysis (0.1M NaOH)', and 'Oxidative Stress (3% H2O2)'. These three tasks should all have outgoing arrows connecting to 'HPLC Purity Analysis'.

task_completion.description: Transcribe the 6-step protocol into the Stock Solution Preparation task
task_completion.visual_evidence: Inside the 'Stock Solution Preparation' task's Protocol tab, there should be 6 distinct numbered steps containing the transcribed text from the degradation protocol.

task_completion.description: Create the Degradation Reagents inventory with specific columns and items
task_completion.visual_evidence: An inventory named 'Degradation Reagents' should exist with custom columns 'CAS Number' and 'Grade'. It should contain three items: 'Ibuprofen RS', 'HCl 1M', and 'NaOH 1M' with their respective CAS and Grade values.

task_completion.description: Assign Ibuprofen RS and HCl 1M to the Stock Solution Preparation task
task_completion.visual_evidence: Inside the 'Stock Solution Preparation' task, the assigned items/inventories section should list 'Ibuprofen RS' and 'HCl 1M' as assigned to the task.

task_completion.description: Add a text result with HPLC summary and smart annotation to the HPLC Purity Analysis task
task_completion.visual_evidence: Inside the 'HPLC Purity Analysis' task's Results tab, there should be a text result summarizing the HPLC data (mentioning purity percentages like 99.8%, 84.7%, etc.). The text must include a smart annotation for 'Ibuprofen RS', which typically appears as a highlighted or clickable tag (e.g., #Ibuprofen RS).

integrity.description: The agent used the SciNote web interface to complete the task
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots should show a web browser interacting with the SciNote UI, not terminal commands executing SQL queries or API scripts.

integrity.description: The agent read the required text files from the Desktop
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots should show the agent opening or reading 'degradation_protocol.txt' and 'hplc_summary.txt' (e.g., via terminal cat/less or a text editor) to get the content.

integrity.description: The smart annotation was created using SciNote's built-in feature
integrity.visual_evidence: The smart annotation for '#Ibuprofen RS' should look like a proper UI element (a tag or link) in the rich text editor or saved result, not just plain text typed with a hash symbol.

privileged_info_for_vlm: Project name: 'Ibuprofen Forced Degradation - ICH Q1A'. Experiment name: 'Stress Testing Panel'. Tasks: 'Stock Solution Preparation', 'Acid Hydrolysis (0.1M HCl)', 'Base Hydrolysis (0.1M NaOH)', 'Oxidative Stress (3% H2O2)', 'HPLC Purity Analysis'. Workflow: Stock connects to Acid, Base, and Oxidative. Acid, Base, and Oxidative all connect to HPLC. Protocol: 6 steps transcribed into Stock Solution Preparation. Inventory: 'Degradation Reagents' with columns 'CAS Number' and 'Grade'. Items: Ibuprofen RS (58560-75-1, USP RS), HCl 1M (7647-01-0, ACS Reagent), NaOH 1M (1310-73-2, ACS Reagent). Assigned items: Ibuprofen RS and HCl 1M assigned to Stock Solution Preparation. Result: HPLC Purity Analysis contains a text result summarizing purity (Control 99.8%, Acid 84.7%, Base 89.2%, Oxidative 80.2%) and includes a smart annotation for '#Ibuprofen RS'.
